english: To Yama, to Dharmaraja, to Death and to Antaka
roman: Yamaya Dharmarajaya mrityave cha antakaya cha

english: To Vaivasvata, to Kala, to the dissolution of all beings
roman: Vaivasvataya kalaya sarva bhuta kshayaya cha

english: To the Udumbara-hued one, Dadhna, Nila, the supreme one
To Vrikodara, to Chitra, and salutations to Chitragupta
roman: Vrikoda raya chitraya Chitragupta ya vai namah

english: Whoever reads Yama Stotram at the time of Shraddha with faith
roman: Shraddha kale Yama stotram pathed yah shraddhayan vitah

hindi: तस्य पितरः सर्वे नरकाद् उद्धृता भवेत्॥
english: His ancestors are all delivered from hell
roman: Tasya pitarah sarve narakad uddhrita bhavet

english: O Dharmaraja, great king, lord of all beings

hindi: मम पितॄन् रक्ष देव, यमाय ते नमः॥
english: O Lord, protect my ancestors — salutations to you Yama
roman: Mama pitrin raksha deva Yamaya te namah
